                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.TopicCount">Topics</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap; text-align:right;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview" SortBy="x => x.TotalLag">Total Lag</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap; text-align:center;">Actions</MudTh>
                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    @{ var dbl = EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, () => OnGroupSelected(context)); }
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-kafka-group-id-main">@context.GroupId</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Text"
                                 Color="@StateColor(context.State)">@context.State</MudChip>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        @context.TopicCount
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:right;" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        @if (context.TotalLag > 0)
                        {
                            <span class="bm-kafka-lag-warn">
                                @context.TotalLag.ToString("N0")
                                <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Warning"
                                         Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-lag-icon" />
                            </span>
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            <span class="bm-kafka-mono">0</span>
                        }
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                        <div class="bm-row-actions">
                            <MudTooltip Text="Delete consumer group">
                                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.DeleteOutline"
                                               Size="Size.Small"
                                               Color="Color.Error"
                                               OnClick="@(() => DeleteConsumerGroupAsync(context.GroupId))" />
                            </MudTooltip>
                        </div>
                    </MudTd>
                </RowTemplate>
            </MudTable>
        </div>

        @if (_selectedGroup is not null)
        {
            <div class="bm-inspector-detail">
                <div class="bm-inspector-detail-header">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-mono">
                        <strong>@_selectedGroup.GroupId</strong>
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selectedGroup.State
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selectedGroup.TopicCount topic@(_selectedGroup.TopicCount == 1 ? "" : "s")
                    </span>
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                   OnClick="@(() => { _selectedGroup = null; _topicLags = null; })" />
                </div>
                <div class="bm-inspector-detail-body">
                    @if (_loadingDetail)
                    {
                        <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" />
                    }
                    else if (_topicLags is not null)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Subscribed topics</div>
                        <table class="bm-kafka-info-table" style="width:100%;">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Topic</th>
                                    <th style="text-align:right; width:80px;">Parts</th>
                                    <th style="text-align:right; width:100px;">Lag</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                @foreach (var t in _topicLags)
                                {
                                    <tr>
                                        <td class="bm-kafka-topic-name">@t.TopicName</td>
                                        <td style="text-align:right;" class="bm-kafka-mono">@t.Partitions</td>
                                        <td style="text-align:right;" class="@(t.Lag > 0 ? "bm-kafka-lag-warn" : "bm-kafka-mono")">
                                            @t.Lag.ToString("N0")
                                            @if (t.Lag > 0)
                                            {
                                                <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Warning"
                                                         Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-kafka-lag-icon" />
                                            }
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                }
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    }

</div>

@code {
    private enum KafkaView { Topics, Consumers }

    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    // Shared
    private KafkaClusterInfo? _cluster  = null;
    private KafkaView         _viewMode = KafkaView.Topics;
    private bool              _loading  = true;
    private bool              _enriching = false;
    private string            _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string?           _filterParseError = null;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    // Topics
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _allTopics      = new();
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _filteredTopics = new();
    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> _paged          = new();
    private int _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;

    // Client-side sort state for the topic table. Because the whole topic set lives in
    // memory (_filteredTopics), the sort must be applied to that full set before it's
    // sliced into the current page — otherwise it would only reorder the visible page.
    private string _sortColumn     = "Name";
    private bool   _sortDescending = false;

    // Consumers
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview> _allGroups      = new();
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview> _filteredGroups = new();
    private KafkaConsumerGroupOverview?      _selectedGroup  = null;
    private List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>?        _topicLags      = null;
    private bool _loadingDetail = false;

    // Filter parsers
    private static readonly FilterParser TopicParser = new(["Name", "PartitionCount", "MessageCount"],
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["name"]       = "Name",
            ["topic"]      = "Name",
            ["partitions"] = "PartitionCount",
            ["parts"]      = "PartitionCount",
            ["messages"]   = "MessageCount",
            ["msgs"]       = "MessageCount",
        });

    private static readonly FilterParser GroupParser = new(["GroupId", "State"],
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["group"]   = "GroupId",
            ["groupid"] = "GroupId",
            ["state"]   = "State",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _topicFieldHints =
    [
        ("name / topic",         "topic name"),
        ("partitions / parts",   "partition count (supports >, >=, <, <=, ..)"),
        ("messages / msgs",      "message count (supports >, >=, <, <=, ..)"),
    ];

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _groupFieldHints =
    [
        ("group / groupid", "consumer group ID"),
        ("state",           "Stable / Rebalancing / Dead / Empty"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading   = true;
        _enriching = false;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var ct = _cts.Token;

            if (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics)
            {
                // Phase 1 — cluster info and topic list in parallel; render cluster bar as
                // soon as GetClusterInfoAsync resolves (don't block on topics).
                var clusterTask = KafkaSvc.GetClusterInfoAsync(Environment, ct);
                var topicsTask  = KafkaSvc.GetTopicsAsync(Environment, ct);

                _cluster = await clusterTask;
                StateHasChanged(); // show cluster bar immediately

                _allTopics = (await topicsTask).ToList();
                ApplyFilter();
                _loading   = false;
                _enriching = true;
                StateHasChanged(); // show topic table (partitions already known) while enrichment loads

                // Phase 2 — cleanup policy (for the "~" compacted marker) + an estimated
                // message count, for every topic in one batched call (a handful of broker
                // round trips total, not one AdminClient + one-or-two round trips per topic).
                var enrichment = await KafkaSvc.GetTopicEnrichmentAsync(Environment, _allTopics, ct);
                if (!ct.IsCancellationRequested)
                {
                    for (var i = 0; i < _allTopics.Count; i++)
                    {
                        if (!enrichment.TryGetValue(_allTopics[i].Name, out var e)) continue;
                        _allTopics[i] = _allTopics[i] with
                        {
                            CleanupPolicy = e.CleanupPolicy,
                            MessageCount  = e.MessageCount,
                            ConfigLoaded  = true,
                        };
                    }
                    ApplyFilter();
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // Consumers: cluster info and group list in parallel; render cluster bar first.
                var clusterTask = KafkaSvc.GetClusterInfoAsync(Environment, ct);
                var groupsTask  = KafkaSvc.GetAllConsumerGroupsAsync(Environment, ct);

                _cluster = await clusterTask;
                StateHasChanged();

                _allGroups     = (await groupsTask).ToList();
                _selectedGroup = null;
                _topicLags     = null;
                ApplyFilter();
            }
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to load Kafka {ViewMode} for env {Env}", _viewMode, Environment);
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load Kafka data: {ex.Message}", ex, "Kafka Dashboard");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading   = false;
            _enriching = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private void SwitchView(KafkaView view)
    {
        if (_viewMode == view) return;
        _viewMode         = view;
        _filterText       = string.Empty;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _selectedGroup    = null;
        _topicLags        = null;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node  = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try
            {
                node = (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics ? TopicParser : GroupParser).Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc);
            }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        if (_viewMode == KafkaView.Topics)
        {
            _filteredTopics = node is null
                ? _allTopics
                : _allTopics.Where(t => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, t)).ToList();
            _page = 1;
            RebuildPage();
        }
        else
        {
            _filteredGroups = node is null
                ? _allGroups
                : _allGroups.Where(g => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, g)).ToList();
        }
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private void RebuildPage()
    {
        // Sort the full filtered set first, THEN slice the page out of it.
        var sorted = SortTopics(_filteredTopics);
        _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(sorted.Count / (double)_pageSize));
        _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        _paged      = sorted.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();
    }

    private List<KafkaTopicSummary> SortTopics(List<KafkaTopicSummary> topics)
    {
        var sorted = _sortColumn switch
        {
            "PartitionCount" => _sortDescending
                ? topics.OrderByDescending(t => t.PartitionCount)
                : topics.OrderBy(t => t.PartitionCount),
            "MessageCount" => _sortDescending
                ? topics.OrderByDescending(t => t.MessageCount)
                : topics.OrderBy(t => t.MessageCount),
            _ => _sortDescending
                ? topics.OrderByDescending(t => t.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                : topics.OrderBy(t => t.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
        };
        return sorted.ToList();
    }

    private void OnTopicSort(string field)
    {
        if (_sortColumn == field) _sortDescending = !_sortDescending;
        else { _sortColumn = field; _sortDescending = false; }
        RebuildPage();
    }

    private RenderFragment SortHeader(string label, string field) => @<MudLink
        Underline="Underline.Hover" Color="Color.Inherit"
        OnClick="@(() => OnTopicSort(field))"
        Style="cursor:pointer; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:2px;">
        @label
        @if (_sortColumn == field)
        {
            <MudIcon Icon="@(_sortDescending ? Icons.Material.Filled.ArrowDownward : Icons.Material.Filled.ArrowUpward)"
                     Size="Size.Small" />
        }
    </MudLink>;

    private void OnPageChanged(int page)   { _page = page;  RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int sz) { _pageSize = sz; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async Task OnGroupSelected(KafkaConsumerGroupOverview? group)
    {
        if (group is null || ReferenceEquals(_selectedGroup, group))
        {
            _selectedGroup = null;
            _topicLags     = null;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }
        _selectedGroup = group;
        _topicLags     = null;
        _loadingDetail = true;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var lags   = await KafkaSvc.GetGroupTopicLagsAsync(Environment, group.GroupId, _cts.Token);
            _topicLags = lags.ToList();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to load lags for group {GroupId}", group.GroupId);
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load lag data for \"{group.GroupId}\": {ex.Message}", ex, "Kafka Dashboard");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loadingDetail = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmAsync(string message, string confirmText = "Delete")
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Confirm", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message     },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, confirmText },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task OpenPurgeTopicsDialogAsync()
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<BulkActionDialog>
        {
            { x => x.ActionVerb,        "Purge" },
            { x => x.ButtonColor,       Color.Error },
            { x => x.ItemLabel,         "Kafka topic" },
            { x => x.LoadItemsAsync,    () => Task.FromResult(_allTopics.Select(t => t.Name).ToList()) },
            { x => x.Endpoint,          "api/kafka/purge" },
            { x => x.BuildRequestBody,  (List<string> items) => new { Env = Environment, Items = items } },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<BulkActionDialog>("Purge Kafka topics", parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private async Task DeleteTopicAsync(string topicName)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Delete topic \"{topicName}\"? This permanently removes all messages and cannot be undone.")) return;
        try
        {
            await KafkaSvc.DeleteTopicAsync(Environment, topicName, _cts.Token);
            Snackbar.Add($"Topic \"{topicName}\" deleted.", Severity.Success);
        }
        catch
        {
            try
            {
                await KafkaSvc.SetTopicRetentionAsync(Environment, topicName, 1, _cts.Token);
                Snackbar.Add($"Could not delete \"{topicName}\" — retention set to 1 ms (messages will expire shortly).", Severity.Warning);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Notifications.Report($"Failed to delete or clear topic \"{topicName}\".", ex, "Kafka Dashboard");
                return;
            }
        }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task DeleteConsumerGroupAsync(string groupId)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Delete consumer group \"{groupId}\"? Offsets for this group will be lost.")) return;
        try
        {
            await KafkaSvc.DeleteConsumerGroupAsync(Environment, groupId, _cts.Token);
            if (_selectedGroup?.GroupId == groupId) { _selectedGroup = null; _topicLags = null; }
            Snackbar.Add($"Consumer group \"{groupId}\" deleted.", Severity.Success);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to delete consumer group \"{groupId}\".", ex, "Kafka Dashboard");
            return;
        }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task OpenInfoDialog(KafkaTopicSummary topic)
    {
        var p = new DialogParameters<KafkaTopicInfoDialog>
        {
            { x => x.TopicName,    topic.Name  },
            { x => x.Environment,  Environment },
            { x => x.MessageCount, topic.ConfigLoaded ? FormatMessages(topic) : null },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<KafkaTopicInfoDialog>($"{topic.Name} — config", p,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private async Task OpenGroupsDialog(string topicName)
    {
        var p = new DialogParameters<KafkaConsumerGroupsDialog>
        {
            { x => x.TopicName,   topicName   },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<KafkaConsumerGroupsDialog>($"{topicName} — consumer groups", p,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private void OpenInspector(string topicName)
        => TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateKafkaTopicInspector(topicName, Environment));

    private static string FormatMessages(KafkaTopicSummary t)
    {
        var prefix = t.CleanupPolicy.Contains("compact") ? "~" : "";
        return prefix + t.MessageCount.ToString("N0");
    }

    private static Color StateColor(string state) => state switch
    {
        "Stable"      => Color.Success,
        "Rebalancing" => Color.Warning,
        "Dead"        => Color.Error,
        _             => Color.Default,
    };

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@inject IKafkaMonitor KafkaSvc
@inject ILogger<KafkaGroupsDashboard> Logger
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject TabService TabService
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter consumer groups…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <ToolbarRefresh Loading="@_result.IsLoading"
                        OnRefresh="LoadAsync" />
    </div>

    <!-- Table -->
    <div class="bm-table-wrap @(_selected is not null ? "bm-inspector-split-top" : "")">
        @if (_result.IsFailed)
        {
            <MudAlert Severity="Severity.Error" Dense="true" Class="bm-data-error ma-2">@_result.Error</MudAlert>

        @if (_result.IsLoading)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
        }
        <MudTable T="KafkaConsumerGroupOverview"
                  Items="_filtered"

                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.State
                    &nbsp;·&nbsp; @_selected.TopicCount topic@(_selected.TopicCount == 1 ? "" : "s")

                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                               Size="Size.Small"
                               OnClick="@(() => { _selected = null; _detailResult = default; })" />

                    <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Subscribed topics</div>

                        <thead>

                                <th style="text-align:right; width:100px;">Lag</th>

                                    <td style="text-align:right;" class="bm-kafka-mono">@t.Partitions</td>

                </AsyncData>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>  _all      = new();
    private List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>  _filtered = new();
    private KafkaConsumerGroupOverview?              _selected = null;
    private Result<List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>> _result;
    private Result<List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>>         _detailResult;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["GroupId", "State"];
    private static readonly FilterParser Parser = new(SearchableFields,
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["group"]   = "GroupId",
            ["groupid"] = "GroupId",
            ["state"]   = "State",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("group / groupid", "consumer group ID"),
        ("state",           "Stable / Rebalancing / Dead / Empty"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _result       = default; // loading
        _selected     = null;
        _detailResult = default;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var groups = await KafkaSvc.GetAllConsumerGroupsAsync(Environment, _cts.Token);
            _all = groups.ToList();
            ApplyFilter();
            _result = Result<List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>>.Ok(_all);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex) { _result = Result<List<KafkaConsumerGroupOverview>>.Fail(ex.Message); }
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = Parser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }
        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(g => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, g)).ToList();
    }

    private void ApplyFilter() => OnFilterChanged(_filterText);

    private async Task OnRowSelected(KafkaConsumerGroupOverview? group)
    {
        if (group is null || ReferenceEquals(_selected, group))
        {
            _selected     = null;
            _detailResult = default;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }
        _selected     = group;
        _detailResult = default; // loading
        using (TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService))
        {
            StateHasChanged();
            try
            {
                var lags  = await KafkaSvc.GetGroupTopicLagsAsync(Environment, group.GroupId, _cts.Token);
                _detailResult = Result<List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>>.Ok(lags.ToList());
            }
            catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to load lags for group {GroupId}", group.GroupId);
                _detailResult = Result<List<KafkaGroupTopicLag>>.Fail(ex.Message);
            }
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private static Color StateColor(string state) => state switch
    {
        "Stable"      => Color.Success,
        "Rebalancing" => Color.Warning,
        "Dead"        => Color.Error,
        "Empty"       => Color.Default,
        _             => Color.Default,
    };

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/KafkaTopicInspector.razor

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@inject IKafkaMonitor KafkaSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ILogger<KafkaTopicInspector> Logger
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar row 1: topic name, on its own line -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <span class="bm-inspector-topic">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.MoveToInbox" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-inspector-topic-icon" />
            @TopicName
        </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Toolbar row 2: filter, mode, clear, stats, start, counters -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter or seek: partition:0 offset:>1000 latest:500 timestamp:>2024-01-15"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <!-- Mode select -->
        <MudSelect T="string" Value="_modeKey" ValueChanged="OnModeChanged"
                   Label="Mode" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Dense="true" Margin="Margin.Dense"
                   FullWidth="false" Class="bm-select-fit bm-tl-select-labeled">
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("all")">From beginning</MudSelectItem>
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("latestN")">Latest 500</MudSelectItem>
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("fromOffset")">From offset</MudSelectItem>
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("fromTimestamp")">From timestamp</MudSelectItem>
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("offsetRange")">Offset range</MudSelectItem>
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("tsRange")">Timestamp range</MudSelectItem>
        </MudSelect>

        <!-- Clear -->
        <MudTooltip Text="Clear — stop and clear messages (does not restart)">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ClearAll"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           OnClick="ClearMessages" />
        </MudTooltip>

        <!-- Stats popover -->
        <MudTooltip Text="Partition stats">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Analytics"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Color="@(_showStats ? Color.Primary : Color.Default)"
                           OnClick="ToggleStats" />
        </MudTooltip>

        <!-- Start / Pause -->
        <MudTooltip Text="@(_state == StreamState.Running ? "Pause" : "Start")">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@(_state == StreamState.Running
                                    ? Icons.Material.Outlined.Pause
                                    : Icons.Material.Outlined.PlayArrow)"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           Color="@(_state == StreamState.Running ? Color.Warning : Color.Success)"
                           OnClick="ToggleStream" />
        </MudTooltip>

        <span class="bm-inspector-count bm-muted">
            @if (_filterText.Length > 0)
            {
                <span>@_filtered.Count / @_messages.Count</span>
            }
            else
            {
                <span>@_messages.Count</span>
            }
            <span>&nbsp;msg@(_messages.Count == 1 ? "" : "s")</span>
            @if (_state == StreamState.Running)
            {
                <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.FiberManualRecord"
                         Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Error" Class="bm-inspector-live-dot" />
            }
            else if (_state == StreamState.Paused)
            {
                <span class="bm-muted" style="font-size:10px;">paused</span>
            }
        </span>
    </div>

    <!-- Stats dialog -->
    <MudDialog Visible="_showStats" VisibleChanged="@((v) => _showStats = v)">
        <TitleContent>
            <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">Partition stats — @TopicName</MudText>
        </TitleContent>
        <DialogContent>
            @if (_statsLoading)
            {
                <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Style="height:2px;margin-bottom:8px;" />
            }
            @if (_stats.Count > 0)
            {
                <table class="bm-kafka-stats-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Partition</th>
                            <th>Low offset</th>

                            <th>Messages</th>
                            <th>First message</th>

                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var s in _stats)

                                <td><span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-muted">@(s.LastMessageTimestamp.HasValue  ? DtSvc.Format(s.LastMessageTimestamp.Value,  "HH:mm:ss")             : "—")</span></td>
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            }
        </DialogContent>
        <DialogActions>
            <MudButton StartIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Refresh" OnClick="LoadStatsAsync" Disabled="_statsLoading">Refresh</MudButton>
            <MudButton OnClick="@(() => _showStats = false)">Close</MudButton>
        </DialogActions>
    </MudDialog>

    <!-- Message table + detail side by side -->
    <div class="bm-inspector-body">
        <div class="bm-table-wrap">
            @if (_state == StreamState.Running && (_messages.Count == 0 || _boundedFetch))
            {
                <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
            }

            <MudTable T="KafkaMessage"
                      Items="_filtered"
                      Dense="true"
                      Hover="true"
                      Elevation="0"
                      Striped="true"
                      FixedHeader="true"
                      Virtualize="true"
                      Height="100%"
                      SelectedItem="_selected"
                      SelectedItemChanged="OnRowSelected"
                      RowClassFunc="@((msg, _) => ReferenceEquals(msg, _selected) ? "bm-row-selected" : "")"
                      OnRowClick="OnRowClick"
                      Class="bm-batch-table bm-inspector-table">
                <HeaderContent>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.Offset">Offset</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.Partition">Part</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.Key ?? string.Empty">Key</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.PayloadType">Type</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.RawSizeBytes">Size</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="white-space:nowrap;">
                        <MudTableSortLabel T="KafkaMessage" SortBy="m => m.Timestamp">Timestamp (UTC)</MudTableSortLabel>
                    </MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="width:100%;">Payload</MudTh>
                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    @{ var dbl = EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, () => DownloadMessageAsync(context)); }
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@context.Offset</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono">@context.Partition</span>

                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-payload-type @TypeChipClass(context.PayloadType)">@context.PayloadType</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="white-space:nowrap;" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-muted">@context.RawSizeBytes B</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-muted">@DtSvc.Format(context.Timestamp, "HH:mm:ss.fff")</span>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <span class="bm-inspector-preview">@TruncateValue(context.JsonPayload)</span>
                    </MudTd>
                </RowTemplate>
            </MudTable>
        </div>

        @if (_selected is not null)
        {
            <div class="bm-inspector-resizer" @onmousedown="OnResizerMouseDown"></div>
            <div class="bm-inspector-detail" style="width:@(_detailWidth)px" @ref="_detailRef">
                <div class="bm-inspector-detail-header">
                    <span class="bm-kafka-mono">
                        offset <strong>@_selected.Offset</strong>
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; partition <strong>@_selected.Partition</strong>
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; @DtSvc.Format(_selected.Timestamp, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff")@DtSvc.ZoneSuffix
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="bm-kafka-payload-type @TypeChipClass(_selected.PayloadType)">@_selected.PayloadType</span>
                        &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="bm-muted">@_selected.RawSizeBytes B</span>
                    </span>
                    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">
                        <MudTooltip Text="Expand all">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.UnfoldMore"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SetJsonCollapsedAsync(false))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudTooltip Text="Collapse all">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.UnfoldLess"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SetJsonCollapsedAsync(true))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudTooltip Text="Download raw binary">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Download"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => DownloadMessageAsync(_selected))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudTooltip Text="Save JSON">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.SaveAlt"
                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SaveJsonAsync(_selected))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                                       Size="Size.Small"
                                       OnClick="@(() => _selected = null)" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-inspector-detail-body">
                    @if (_selected.Headers.Count > 0)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Headers</div>
                        <div class="bm-inspector-headers">
                            @foreach (var h in _selected.Headers)
                            {
                                <span class="bm-inspector-header-key">@h.Key</span>
                                <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-inspector-header-val">@h.Value</span>
                            }
                        </div>
                    }
                    <div class="bm-inspector-section-label">Payload</div>
                    <div @ref="_jsonRef"></div>
                </div>

                <!-- JSONPath query bar — evaluated against this message's JsonPayload,
                     result rendered into the same tree view above via bmJsonViewer. -->
                <div class="bm-jsonpath-bar">
                    <MudTextField T="string" @bind-Value="_jsonPathQuery" Immediate="true"
                                  Placeholder="JSONPath — e.g. $.items[?(&#64;.price &gt; 10)]"
                                  Variant="Variant.Outlined" Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                  Adornment="Adornment.Start" AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ManageSearch"
                                  @onkeydown="OnJsonPathKeyDown"
                                  Class="bm-jsonpath-input" />
                    <MudTooltip Text="Run query">
                        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.PlayArrow" Size="Size.Small"
                                       OnClick="RunJsonPathQueryAsync" />
                    </MudTooltip>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_jsonPathQuery))
                    {
                        <MudTooltip Text="Clear — show full payload again">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Clear" Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="ClearJsonPathQueryAsync" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                    }
                </div>
                @if (_jsonPathError is not null)
                {
                    <div class="bm-jsonpath-error">@_jsonPathError</div>
                }
                else if (_jsonPathMatchCount is not null)
                {
                    <div class="bm-jsonpath-count bm-muted">@_jsonPathMatchCount match@(_jsonPathMatchCount == 1 ? "" : "es")</div>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string TopicName   { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab      { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused     { get; set; } = true;

    // While unfocused, the streaming loop below still consumes into _messages (no data
    // loss) but skips the per-message filter re-apply + render — a hidden tab was
    // re-filtering and re-rendering up to 3,000 rows every 150ms for no one to see.
    // Catch up once when focus returns.
    private bool _previousIsFocused = true;

    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;
        var gained = IsFocused && !_previousIsFocused;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        if (!gained) return;

        var (_, remaining) = ExtractDirective(_filterText);
        ApplyClientFilter(remaining);
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private enum StreamState { Idle, Running, Paused }

    // Live streams (e.g. "from beginning") never stop growing on their own — without
    // a cap, a long-running session leaves thousands of real MudTable rows in the DOM,
    // which is both slow to render and slow to tear down when the tab is closed.
    private const int MaxBufferedMessages = 3_000;

    private List<KafkaMessage>                _messages  = [];
    private List<KafkaMessage>                _filtered  = [];
    private KafkaMessage?                     _selected;
    private ElementReference                  _jsonRef;
    private ElementReference                  _detailRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<KafkaTopicInspector>? _selfRef;
    private double                            _detailWidth = 380;
    private bool                              _jsonDirty;
    private StreamState                       _state       = StreamState.Idle;
    private CancellationTokenSource           _cts         = new();
    private bool                              _boundedFetch;

    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError;

    private bool                         _showStats    = false;
    private bool                         _statsLoading = false;
    private List<KafkaPartitionStats>    _stats        = [];

    private string _modeKey = "all";

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields =
        ["Key", "PayloadType", "Partition", "Offset", "Timestamp", "latest"];

    private static readonly FilterParser Parser = new(SearchableFields,
        new Dictionary<string, string>
        {
            ["key"]       = "Key",
            ["partition"] = "Partition",
            ["offset"]    = "Offset",
            ["ts"]        = "Timestamp",
            ["timestamp"] = "Timestamp",
            ["type"]      = "PayloadType",
            ["latest"]    = "latest",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("key",              "message key"),
        ("partition",        "partition:0  /  partition:0,2,4  /  partition:0..3"),
        ("offset",           "offset:>1000  /  offset:1000..2000"),
        ("timestamp / ts",   "timestamp:>2024-01-15T10:00  /  timestamp:2024-01-01..2024-02-01"),
        ("latest",           "latest:500  — fetch last N messages per partition"),
        ("type",             "PayloadType: OrderEvent / PaymentEvent / ProtoMsg / unknown"),
        ("<field>",          "any JSON payload field: orderId:abc  /  amount:>100"),
    ];

    protected override Task OnInitializedAsync() => Task.CompletedTask;

    // ── Stream control ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    // Minimum time between UI renders while messages are streaming in. Without
    // this, a fast fetch (e.g. "latest 500" or "from beginning") re-renders and
    // sends a SignalR batch on every single message, flooding the render queue
    // and starving other UI interactions (buttons feel unresponsive) even
    // though nothing is actually CPU-bound.
    private const int StreamRenderIntervalMs = 150;

    private async Task StartStreamAsync()
    {
        var ct = _cts.Token; // captured — lets us detect if a newer action (Clear/Reset/Toggle) supersedes us
        _state = StreamState.Running;
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        StateHasChanged();

        var (directive, remaining) = ExtractDirective(_filterText);
        _boundedFetch = directive.Latest.HasValue || directive.OffsetTo.HasValue || directive.TimestampTo.HasValue;
        var lastRender = DateTime.MinValue;

        try
        {
            await foreach (var msg in KafkaSvc.TailTopicAsync(Environment, TopicName, directive, ct))
            {
                _messages.Insert(0, msg);
                if (_messages.Count > MaxBufferedMessages)
                    _messages.RemoveRange(MaxBufferedMessages, _messages.Count - MaxBufferedMessages);

                // Skip the filter re-apply + render entirely while unfocused — data keeps
                // accumulating above regardless; OnParametersSet catches up once when the
                // tab regains focus.
                if (!IsFocused) continue;

                var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
                if ((now - lastRender).TotalMilliseconds < StreamRenderIntervalMs) continue;
                lastRender = now;

                ApplyClientFilter(remaining);
                await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
            }

            // Final flush — the last few messages may have arrived inside the
            // throttle window and never got rendered.
            ApplyClientFilter(remaining);
            await InvokeAsync(() =>
            {
                if (ct.IsCancellationRequested) return; // superseded by a newer action
                _state = StreamState.Idle;
                Tab?.EndLoading();
                TabService.NotifyChanged();
                StateHasChanged();
            });
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException)
        {
            ApplyClientFilter(remaining);
            await InvokeAsync(() =>
            {
                if (_cts.Token != ct) return; // a newer Clear/Reset/Toggle already set the desired state
                _state = StreamState.Paused;
                Tab?.EndLoading();
                TabService.NotifyChanged();
                StateHasChanged();
            });
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Kafka stream failed for topic {Topic}", TopicName);
            await InvokeAsync(() =>
            {
                if (_cts.Token != ct) return;
                _state = StreamState.Idle;
                Tab?.EndLoading();
                TabService.NotifyChanged();
                StateHasChanged();
                Notifications.Report($"Failed to tail topic \"{TopicName}\": {ex.Message}", ex, "Kafka Topic Inspector");
            });
        }
    }

    private void ToggleStream()
    {
        if (_state == StreamState.Running)
        {
            _cts.Cancel();
            _state = StreamState.Paused;
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
            StateHasChanged();
        }
        else
        {
            _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
            _ = StartStreamAsync();
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Stops and clears messages without restarting the fetch — used by the toolbar Clear button.</summary>
    private void ClearMessages()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts      = new CancellationTokenSource();
        _messages.Clear();
        _filtered.Clear();
        _selected = null;
        _state    = StreamState.Idle;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    /// <summary>Clears messages and restarts the fetch — used when the seek directive changes (mode/partition filter).</summary>
    private void ResetStream()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts      = new CancellationTokenSource();
        _messages.Clear();
        _filtered.Clear();
        _selected = null;
        _ = StartStreamAsync();
    }

    private void OnModeChanged(string key)
    {
        _modeKey = key;
        var today = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
        var snippet = key switch
        {
            "latestN"       => "latest:500",
            "fromOffset"    => "offset:>=0",
            "fromTimestamp" => $"timestamp:>={today}",
            "offsetRange"   => "offset:0..1000",
            "tsRange"       => $"timestamp:{today}..{today}",
            _               => "",
        };

        var cleaned = RemoveKafkaSeekTerms(_filterText);
        _filterText = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snippet)
            ? cleaned.Trim()
            : (cleaned.Trim() + " " + snippet).Trim();
        _filterParseError = null;
    }


    private void SetMode(string filterSnippet)
    {
        var cleaned = RemoveKafkaSeekTerms(_filterText);
        _filterText = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filterSnippet)
            ? cleaned.Trim()
            : (cleaned.Trim() + " " + filterSnippet).Trim();
        _filterParseError = null;
        ResetStream();
    }

    private static string RemoveKafkaSeekTerms(string text)
    {
        // Naive removal: strip tokens matching latest:N, offset:..., timestamp:...
        var terms = text.Split(' ', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        return string.Join(' ', terms.Where(t =>
        {
            var lower = t.ToLowerInvariant();
            return !lower.StartsWith("latest:") &&
                   !lower.StartsWith("offset:") &&
                   !lower.StartsWith("timestamp:");
        }));
    }

    // ── Stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ToggleStats()
    {
        _showStats = true;
        await LoadStatsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadStatsAsync()
    {
        _statsLoading = true;
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var result = await KafkaSvc.GetPartitionStatsAsync(Environment, TopicName);
            _stats = [.. result];
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed loading partition stats for {Topic}", TopicName);
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load partition stats for \"{TopicName}\": {ex.Message}", ex, "Kafka Topic Inspector");
        }
        finally
        {
            _statsLoading = false;
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;

        // Re-parse and re-apply client-side filter without restarting the stream
        var (_, remaining) = ExtractDirective(text);
        ApplyClientFilter(remaining);
    }

    private void ApplyClientFilter(FilterNode? node)
    {
        _filtered = node is null
            ? _messages
            : _messages.Where(m => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, m)).ToList();
    }

    private (KafkaSeekDirective Directive, FilterNode? Remaining) ExtractDirective(string text)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
            return (KafkaSeekDirective.Default, null);
        try
        {
            var ast = Parser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc);
            return KafkaFilterExtractor.Extract(ast);
        }
        catch (FilterParseException ex)
        {
            _filterParseError = ex.Message;
            return (KafkaSeekDirective.Default, null);
        }
    }

    // ── JSONPath query bar ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string  _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
    private string? _jsonPathError;
    private int?    _jsonPathMatchCount;

    private async Task OnJsonPathKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter") await RunJsonPathQueryAsync();
        else if (e.Key == "Escape") await ClearJsonPathQueryAsync();
    }

    private async Task RunJsonPathQueryAsync()
    {
        if (_selected is null) return;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_jsonPathQuery))
        {
            await ClearJsonPathQueryAsync();
            return;
        }

        var result = JsonPathQueryService.Evaluate(_selected.JsonPayload, _jsonPathQuery);
        if (!result.Success)
        {
            _jsonPathError      = result.Error;
            _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }

        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = result.MatchCount;
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, result.ResultJson); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task ClearJsonPathQueryAsync()
    {
        _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
        if (_selected is not null)
        {
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, _selected.JsonPayload ?? "{}"); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── Row selection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnRowClick(TableRowClickEventArgs<KafkaMessage> args)
    {
        _selected  = ReferenceEquals(_selected, args.Item) ? null : args.Item;
        _jsonDirty = _selected is not null;
        // A stale query result from a previously selected message shouldn't linger
        // once the selection changes — reset the bar, OnAfterRenderAsync re-renders
        // the newly selected message's full payload via _jsonDirty above.
        _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
    }

    private void OnRowSelected(KafkaMessage? msg) { } // handled by OnRowClick

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_jsonDirty && _selected is not null)
        {
            _jsonDirty = false;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, _selected.JsonPayload ?? "{}"); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogWarning(ex, "JSON viewer render failed for {Topic}", TopicName);
                Notifications.Report("Failed to render the message preview.", ex, "Kafka Topic Inspector");
            }
        }
    }

    // ── Download ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task DownloadMessageAsync(KafkaMessage? msg)
    {
        if (msg is null) return;
        try
        {
            var bytes    = await KafkaSvc.FetchRawBytesAsync(Environment, TopicName, msg.Partition, msg.Offset);
            var filename = SanitizeFilename($"{msg.Key ?? $"offset-{msg.Offset}"}.bin");
            if (bytes is not null)
                await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveBytes", filename, bytes, "application/octet-stream");
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Download failed");
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to download message: {ex.Message}", ex, "Kafka Topic Inspector");
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveJsonAsync(KafkaMessage? msg)
    {
        if (msg is null) return;
        var json     = FormatJson(msg.JsonPayload ?? "{}");
        var filename = SanitizeFilename($"{msg.Key ?? $"offset-{msg.Offset}"}.json");
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveFile", filename, json, "application/json");
    }

    private async Task SetJsonCollapsedAsync(bool collapsed)
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.setAllCollapsed", _jsonRef, collapsed); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Resizer ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnResizerMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmInspectorResizer.start", e.ClientX, _selfRef, _detailRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void SetDetailWidth(double w) => _detailWidth = Math.Clamp(w, 250, 900);

    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static string? TruncateValue(string? v)
        => v is null ? null : v.Length > 120 ? v[..120] + "…" : v;

    // Payload types are arbitrary proto message names (unbounded set) — pick a color
    // bucket via a stable hash instead of hardcoding one CSS class per known type name.
    // string.GetHashCode() is randomized per process, so it's not used here.
    private static readonly string[] TypeChipClasses =
    [
        "bm-type-hash-0", "bm-type-hash-1", "bm-type-hash-2", "bm-type-hash-3",
        "bm-type-hash-4", "bm-type-hash-5", "bm-type-hash-6", "bm-type-hash-7",
    ];

    private static string TypeChipClass(string type)
    {
        var hash = 0;
        foreach (var c in type) hash = (hash * 31 + c) & 0x7fffffff;
        return TypeChipClasses[hash % TypeChipClasses.Length];
    }

    private static string FormatJson(string raw)
    {
        try
        {
            var doc = System.Text.Json.JsonDocument.Parse(raw);
            return System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(
                doc.RootElement,
                new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = true });
        }
        catch { return raw; }
    }

    private static string SanitizeFilename(string name) =>
        string.Concat(name.Select(c => Path.GetInvalidFileNameChars().Contains(c) ? '_' : c));

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
    }
}

@inject NavigationManager Nav
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ILogger<LogViewer> Logger
@inject IConfiguration Config

@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-lv-page" @onkeydown="OnPageKeyDown" @onkeydown:preventDefault="@_preventKey">

    </div>

    <!-- ── Find + filter toolbar: selected cell only ─────────────────────── -->
    <LogViewerToolbar @ref="_toolbar"
                      IsSelected="@IsSelected"
                      FindTerm="@_findTerm"
                      IsRegex="@_isRegex"
                      CaseSensitive="@_caseSensitive"
                      MatchCount="@_matchCount"
                      MatchCurrent="@_matchCurrent"
                      FilterStr="@_filterStr"
                      FilterError="@_filterError"
                      TotalCount="@_totalCount"
                      VisibleCount="@_visibleCount"
                      WordWrap="@_wordWrap"
                      FontDecreaseDisabled="@(_fontSize <= _fontSizes[0])"
                      FontIncreaseDisabled="@(_fontSize >= _fontSizes[^1])"
                      FieldHints="@LogFieldHints"
                      OnFindTermChanged="@(v => { _findTerm = v; })"
                      OnRunFind="@(() => RunFindAsync())"
                      OnRegexToggled="OnRegexToggled"
                      OnCaseToggled="OnCaseToggled"
                      OnNextMatch="NextMatchAsync"
                      OnPrevMatch="PrevMatchAsync"
                      OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChangedAsync"
                      OnNextBookmark="NextBookmarkAsync"
                      OnPrevBookmark="PrevBookmarkAsync"
                      OnIncreaseFont="IncreaseFontAsync"
                      OnDecreaseFont="DecreaseFontAsync"

    <!-- ── Body ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

    <div class="bm-lv-body-wrap">

            <div class="bm-lv-loading-overlay">

                <span class="bm-lv-loading-label">@_loadingLabel</span>
