@code {
    [Parameter] public string? Path       { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string  Env        { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? FileName   { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsSelected  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsMultiPane { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsFocused   { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab       { get; set; }

    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnOpen  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnDupH  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnDupV  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public EventCallback OnClose { get; set; }

    private static readonly int[] _fontSizes = [11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16];

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] LogFieldHints =
    [
        ("level, lvl",       "Log level (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG)"),
        ("host",             "Server host name"),
        ("pid",              "Process ID"),
        ("threadId, tid",    "Thread ID"),
        ("message, msg",     "Log message text"),
        ("caller",           "Caller method"),
        ("timestamp, ts",    "Timestamp"),
    ];

    private LogViewport?      _viewport;
    private LogViewerToolbar? _toolbar;

    private string? _loadedPath;
    private bool    _rendered;
    private bool    _dirty;

    private bool    _isLoading;
    private string  _loadingLabel = "Loading file…";
    private string? _error;
    private string? _streamUrl;
    private string? _localKey;
    private int?    _anchorLine;
    private long    _fileOffset;

    private string  _filterStr   = "";
    private string? _filterError;
    private int     _totalCount;
    private int     _visibleCount;

    private string _findTerm      = "";
    private bool   _isRegex;
    private bool   _caseSensitive;
    private int    _matchCount;
    private int    _matchCurrent;

    private int  _fontSize = 13;
    private bool _wordWrap = false;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private const string WordWrapStorageKey = "bm-logviewer-wordwrap"; // separate from the Config page editor's own setting

    private bool           _isTailing;
    private bool           _tailDesired; // true once a live (non-local) file has been rendered
    private bool           _previousIsFocused;
    private PeriodicTimer? _tailTimer;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private bool _preventKey;

    private string _fileName => FileName is { Length: > 0 } fn ? fn :
        System.IO.Path.GetFileName((Path ?? "").TrimEnd('\\', '/')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : "Log";

    private string _pathDisplay => Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
        ? "local file" : (Path ?? "");

    private string _pathTooltip => Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
        ? "local file  •  Click to copy"
        : $"{Path}  •  Click to copy";

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override void OnInitialized() => _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

    // Synchronous and separate from OnParametersSetAsync below — this must not
    // block (fire-and-forget only) so activating a tab never stalls on it.
    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (IsFocused && _tailDesired && !_isTailing)
            StartTail();
        else if (!IsFocused && _isTailing)
            StopTail(clearDesired: false);
    }

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (Path == _loadedPath) return;
        _loadedPath = Path;
        _anchorLine = ParseAnchorLine(new Uri(Nav.Uri).Fragment);
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            try
            {
                _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=8");
                var stored = await _appModule.InvokeAsync<string?>("getLocalStorage", WordWrapStorageKey);
                _wordWrap = stored == "1";
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Failed to read persisted word-wrap preference"); }
        }

        _rendered = true;
        if (_dirty)
        {
            _dirty = false;
            await RenderViewerAsync();
        }
    }

    private async Task OnWordDoubleClickedAsync(string word)
    {
        _findTerm = word;
        // skipScroll — the word is already visible where the user clicked;
        // don't jump the viewport to the first match elsewhere in the file.
        await RunFindAsync(skipScroll: true);
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task OnNameClickAsync(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        var text = Path?.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == true
            ? Path["local:".Length..]
            : (Path ?? "");
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", text, "Copied to clipboard");
    }

    private async Task OnPageKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        _preventKey = false;
        var k = e.Key;

        // ── Cell controls ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+O — open
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "o" && OnOpen.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnOpen.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+W — close
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "w" && OnClose.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnClose.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // F5 — refresh
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && k == "F5")
            { _preventKey = true; await RefreshAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+→ — duplicate right
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "ArrowRight" && OnDupH.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnDupH.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+↓ — duplicate down
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "ArrowDown" && OnDupV.HasDelegate)
            { _preventKey = true; await OnDupV.InvokeAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+Shift+C — share link
        if (e.CtrlKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "C")
            { _preventKey = true; await ShareAsync(); return; }

        // ── Find / filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+F — focus find
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "f")
        {
            _preventKey = true;
            if (_toolbar is not null) await _toolbar.FocusFindAsync();
            return;
        }
        // Ctrl+G — focus filter
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.ShiftKey && !e.AltKey && k == "g")
        {
            _preventKey = true;
            if (_toolbar is not null) await _toolbar.FocusFilterAsync();
            return;
        }
        // F3 — next match
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "F3")
            { _preventKey = true; await NextMatchAsync(); return; }

        // Shift+F3 — previous match
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "F3")
            { _preventKey = true; await PrevMatchAsync(); return; }

        // Alt+R — toggle regex
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "r")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnRegexToggled(!_isRegex); return; }

        // Alt+C — toggle case sensitive
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "c")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnCaseToggled(!_caseSensitive); return; }

        // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // F2 — next bookmark
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "F2")
            { _preventKey = true; await NextBookmarkAsync(); return; }

        // Shift+F2 — previous bookmark
        if (!e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && e.ShiftKey && k == "F2")
            { _preventKey = true; await PrevBookmarkAsync(); return; }

        // ── Display ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        // Ctrl+= or Ctrl++ — increase font
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && (k == "=" || k == "+"))
            { _preventKey = true; await IncreaseFontAsync(); return; }

        // Ctrl+- or Ctrl+_ — decrease font
        if (e.CtrlKey && !e.AltKey && (k == "-" || k == "_"))
            { _preventKey = true; await DecreaseFontAsync(); return; }

        // Alt+Z — word wrap
        if (!e.CtrlKey && e.AltKey && !e.ShiftKey && k == "z")
            { _preventKey = true; await OnWrapToggled(!_wordWrap); return; }
    }

    // ── File loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path)) return;
        _isLoading    = true;
        _loadingLabel = "Loading file…";
        _error        = null;
        StopTail();
        StateHasChanged();

        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();

        try
        {
            if (Path!.StartsWith("local:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                _localKey   = Path["local:".Length..];
                _streamUrl  = null;
                _fileOffset = 0;
            }
            else
            {
                _localKey = null;
                // Stat first, then have the browser fetch() exactly that many bytes over
                // plain HTTP — the content never crosses the SignalR circuit as a giant
                // interop payload, and both the viewer's content and the tail-poll offset
                // below agree on the same cutoff (see /api/logs/read in Program.cs).
                _fileOffset = await LogViewerSvc.GetFileSizeAsync(Path!, _cts.Token);
                _streamUrl  = Nav.ToAbsoluteUri(
                    $"/api/logs/read?path={Uri.EscapeDataString(Path!)}&length={_fileOffset}").ToString();
            }
            _dirty = true;
            // _isLoading / Tab loading stay on — RenderViewerAsync (fired from
            // OnAfterRenderAsync once _dirty is picked up) still has to run the JS
            // parse, which can take a while on a large file; clearing them here would
            // drop the spinner before the actual parsing work even starts.
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _error     = ex.Message;
            _isLoading = false;
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task RenderViewerAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null || (_streamUrl is null && _localKey is null) || !_rendered)
            return;

        try
        {
            _loadingLabel = "Parsing log file…";
            StateHasChanged();

            var formats = Config.GetSection("Logs:Formats").Get<string[]>() ?? [];
            var opts = new { anchorLine = _anchorLine, fontSize = _fontSize, wordWrap = _wordWrap, formats };
            if (_localKey is not null)
            {
                await _viewport.RenderLocalFileAsync(_localKey, opts);
                _localKey = null;
            }
            else
            {
                await _viewport.RenderStreamAsync(_streamUrl!, opts);
                _streamUrl = null;
                StartTail();
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            _isLoading = false;
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        _loadedPath = null;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    // ── Find ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RunFindAsync(bool skipScroll = false)
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.FindAsync(_findTerm,
            new { isRegex = _isRegex, caseSensitive = _caseSensitive, skipScroll });
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task NextMatchAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.NextMatchAsync();
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task PrevMatchAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        var result = await _viewport.PrevMatchAsync();
        _matchCount   = result.Count;
        _matchCurrent = result.Current;
    }

    private async Task OnRegexToggled(bool val)  { _isRegex       = val; await RunFindAsync(); }
    private async Task OnCaseToggled(bool val)   { _caseSensitive = val; await RunFindAsync(); }

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnFilterChangedAsync(string expr)
    {
        _filterStr   = expr;
        _filterError = null;
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var result    = await _viewport.SetFilterAsync(expr);
            _totalCount   = result.Total;
            _visibleCount = result.Visible;
        }
        catch (Exception ex) { _filterError = ex.Message; }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── Bookmarks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task PrevBookmarkAsync() { if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.PrevBookmarkAsync(); }
    private async Task NextBookmarkAsync() { if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.NextBookmarkAsync(); }

    // ── Display controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task DecreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx > 0) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx - 1]; await _viewport!.SetFontSizeAsync(_fontSize); }
    }

    private async Task IncreaseFontAsync()
    {
        var idx = Array.IndexOf(_fontSizes, _fontSize);
        if (idx < _fontSizes.Length - 1) { _fontSize = _fontSizes[idx + 1]; await _viewport!.SetFontSizeAsync(_fontSize); }
    }

    private async Task OnWrapToggled(bool val)
    {
        _wordWrap = val;
        if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.SetWordWrapAsync(val);
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setLocalStorage", WordWrapStorageKey, val ? "1" : "0"); }
            catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Failed to persist word-wrap preference"); }
        }
    }

    // ── Share link ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ShareAsync()
    {
        if (_viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var lineIdx  = await _viewport.GetCurrentTopLineAsync();
            var baseUrl  = Nav.Uri.Split('#')[0];
            var shareUrl = $"{baseUrl}#L{lineIdx + 1}";
            await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", shareUrl, "Share link copied");
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    // ── Live tail ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void StartTail()
    {
        _tailDesired = true;
        if (!IsFocused || _isTailing) return;
        _isTailing = true;
        _tailTimer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10));
        _ = TailLoopAsync();
    }

    private void StopTail(bool clearDesired = true)
    {
        if (clearDesired) _tailDesired = false;
        _isTailing = false;
        _tailTimer?.Dispose();
        _tailTimer = null;
    }

    private async Task TailLoopAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            while (_tailTimer is not null && await _tailTimer.WaitForNextTickAsync(_cts.Token))
            {
                try { await InvokeAsync(TailTickAsync); }
                catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Log viewer tail tick failed"); }
            }
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    private async Task TailTickAsync()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path) || _viewport is null) return;
        try
        {
            var (text, newOffset) = await LogViewerSvc.ReadDeltaAsync(Path!, _fileOffset, _cts.Token);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
            _fileOffset = newOffset;
            await _viewport.AppendRawAsync(text);
        }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Log tail tick failed"); }
    }

    // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private static int? ParseAnchorLine(string fragment)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(fragment)) return null;
        var frag = fragment.TrimStart('#');
        if (frag.StartsWith("L", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            && int.TryParse(frag[1..], out var line) && line > 0)
            return line - 1;
        return null;
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StopTail();
        await _cts.CancelAsync();
        _cts.Dispose();
        if (_viewport is not null) await _viewport.DisposeAsync();
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); } catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/LogWorkspace.razor
LENGTH 4161
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Web.Components
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@inject TabService TabService

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill" style="overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;">
    <WorkspacePanel Node="@_root"
                    SelectedLeaf="@_selected"
                    ShowRing="@(_root is not WsLeaf)"
                    IsFocused="@IsFocused"
                    Tab="@Tab"
                    OnSelect="OnSelect"
                    OnOpen="OnOpen"
                    OnDupH="OnDupH"
                    OnDupV="OnDupV"
                    OnClose="OnClose"
                    OnRatioChanged="OnRatioChanged" />
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string?   Path      { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public string    Env       { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string?   FileName  { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool      IsFocused { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab       { get; set; }

    private WsNode  _root     = null!;
    private WsLeaf? _selected;

    private static readonly DialogOptions _dialogOpts = new()
    {
        CloseButton      = true,
        MaxWidth         = MaxWidth.Small,
        FullWidth        = false,
        CloseOnEscapeKey = true,
        BackdropClick    = true,
    };

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        var leaf  = new WsLeaf(Path, Env, FileName);
        _root     = leaf;
        _selected = leaf;
    }

    private void OnSelect(WsLeaf leaf) { _selected = leaf; StateHasChanged(); }

    private async Task OnOpen(WsLeaf leaf)
    {
        _selected = leaf;
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<OpenLogFileDialog>("Open log file", _dialogOpts);
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        if (result is null || result.Canceled) return;

        var (path, placement) = ((string, OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement))result.Data!;
        var fileName = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(path.TrimEnd('\\', '/')) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : path;

        switch (placement)
        {
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Replace:
                leaf.Path     = path;
                leaf.FileName = fileName;
                break;

            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Left:
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Top:
            {
                var dir     = placement == OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Left ? WsDir.H : WsDir.V;
                var newLeaf = new WsLeaf(path, leaf.Env, fileName);
                _root       = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, newLeaf, leaf));
                _selected   = newLeaf;
                break;
            }

            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Right:
            case OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Bottom:
            {
                var dir     = placement == OpenLogFileDialog.WsPlacement.Right ? WsDir.H : WsDir.V;
                var newLeaf = new WsLeaf(path, leaf.Env, fileName);
                _root       = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, leaf, newLeaf));
                _selected   = newLeaf;
                break;
            }
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnDupH(WsLeaf leaf) => Duplicate(leaf, WsDir.H);
    private void OnDupV(WsLeaf leaf) => Duplicate(leaf, WsDir.V);

    private void Duplicate(WsLeaf leaf, WsDir dir)
    {
        var clone = new WsLeaf(leaf.Path, leaf.Env, leaf.FileName);
        _root     = _root.Replace(leaf, new WsSplit(dir, 0.5, leaf, clone));
        _selected = clone;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnClose(WsLeaf leaf)
    {
        if (_root is WsLeaf)
        {
            if (TabService.ActiveTab is { } tab) TabService.Close(tab.Id);
            return;
        }
        var sibling = _root.FindLeaf(l => !ReferenceEquals(l, leaf));
        var next    = _root.Remove(leaf);
        if (next is null) return;
        _root     = next;
        _selected = sibling;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnRatioChanged((WsSplit split, double ratio) args)
    {
        args.split.Ratio = args.ratio;
        StateHasChanged();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MemoryGraph.razor

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-mg-page">

    <!-- ── Toolbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

    <div class="bm-mg-body">

        <!-- Chart area -->

                {

                       OnFilterChanged="OnLegendFilterChanged"

@code {
    [Parameter] public string  Env            { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? NavigationHint { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab           { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool     IsFocused      { get; set; }

    // ── enums ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private enum GroupBy { None, Service, Host }

    // ── state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private GroupBy _groupBy = GroupBy.Service;
    private string? _lastHint;
    private double?   _windowHours = 1.0;   // null = show all; default to last 1 h
    private int       _lastClickedIndex = -1;
    private bool      _splitView = false;
    // Starts paused/offline: the chart shows the initial snapshot and doesn't auto-refresh
    // until the user hits Resume. Prevents a background tab from continuously re-rendering
    // the D3 chart (and competing for the shared circuit thread) while unattended.
    private bool      _paused = true;

    private IDisposable?         _subscription;
    private DateTime?            _lastUpdated;
    private List<ServiceStatus>  _services = [];

    // OnMetricsUpdated now fires per-service (progressively) rather than once per
    // env-wide poll batch — debounce so a burst of per-service updates collapses
    // into a single rebuild/render instead of one per service.
    private readonly object _renderGate      = new();
    private bool             _renderScheduled;
    private bool             _disposed;

    private sealed class LegendItem
    {
        public string  Key           { get; init; } = "";
        public string  Name          { get; init; } = "";
        public string  Color         { get; init; } = "#888";
        public bool    Visible       { get; set;  } = true;
        // Sum of every instance's current memory in this group (e.g. every "OrderService"
        // instance across all hosts, when grouped by Service) — this is what the chart
        // line plots too, so the legend value matches what's drawn.
        public double  CurrentMb     { get; set;  }
        // CurrentMb / InstanceCount — useful alongside the sum to see whether a group's
        // total is high because of many small instances or a few large ones.
        public double  AverageMb     { get; set;  }
        public int     InstanceCount { get; set;  }
    }

    private List<LegendItem>    _legendItems = [];

    // Legend filter (bottom of the right sidebar) — filters which groups are shown in
    // the list, purely client-side over the already-built legend items.
    private static readonly FilterParser LegendFilterParser = new(["Name"]);
    private string      _legendFilterText  = string.Empty;
    private string?     _legendFilterError;
    private FilterNode? _legendFilterNode;

    private List<LegendItem> FilteredLegendItems =>
        _legendFilterNode is null
            ? _legendItems
            : _legendItems.Where(i => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(_legendFilterNode, i)).ToList();

    private void OnLegendFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _legendFilterText  = text;
        _legendFilterError = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text)) { _legendFilterNode = null; return; }
        try   { _legendFilterNode = LegendFilterParser.Parse(text); }
        catch (FilterParseException ex) { _legendFilterError = ex.Message; _legendFilterNode = null; }
    }

    private List<LineSeriesDto> _lineSeries  = [];
    private ElementReference    _chartRef;
    private ElementReference    _brushRef;
    private ElementReference    _legendRef;
    private ElementReference    _resizeHandleRef;
    private bool                _chartDirty  = true;
    private bool                _resizeWired = false;

    // Raw samples sent to JS; JS handles bucketing + brush-driven zoom.
    private sealed record LineSeriesDto(string Name, string Color, long[] Timestamps, double[] Values, bool IsFaded = false, string? Label = null);

    // 16-color palette
    private static readonly string[] Palette =
    [
        "#4e79a7","#f28e2b","#e15759","#76b7b2","#59a14f",
        "#edc948","#b07aa1","#ff9da7","#9c755f","#bab0ac",
        "#d37295","#fabfd2","#8cd17d","#86bcb6","#499894","#a0cbe8"
    ];

    // ── lifecycle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _subscription = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated += OnMetricsUpdated;
    }

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        try
        {
            _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
            Rebuild();
            ApplyNavigationHint();
        }
        finally
        {
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
        }
    }

    protected override Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (NavigationHint != _lastHint)
            ApplyNavigationHint();
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private void ApplyNavigationHint()
    {
        _lastHint = NavigationHint;
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(NavigationHint)) return;

        // Hint format: "HostName|ServiceName|ProcessId" — the exact key used in GroupBy.None.
        _groupBy = GroupBy.None;
        Rebuild();

        // Show only the exact matching entry; hide everything else.
        foreach (var item in _legendItems)
            item.Visible = item.Key.Equals(NavigationHint, StringComparison.Ordinal);

        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (!_resizeWired)
        {
            _resizeWired = true;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("mgLegendResize", _resizeHandleRef, _legendRef); }
            catch (Exception) { }
        }
        if (_chartDirty)
        {
            _chartDirty = false;
            await RenderLineAsync();
        }
    }

    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        // Skip when paused, or when this tab isn't the one on screen — a background
        // MemoryGraph must not re-render (heavy D3 work on the shared circuit thread)
        // and stall whatever page the user is actually looking at.
        if (env != Env || _paused || !IsFocused) return;

        lock (_renderGate)
        {
            if (_renderScheduled || _disposed) return;
            _renderScheduled = true;
        }
        _ = DebouncedRebuildAsync();
    }

    private async Task DebouncedRebuildAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            await Task.Delay(400);
            lock (_renderGate) { _renderScheduled = false; }
            if (_disposed) return;

            await InvokeAsync(async () =>
            {
                _services = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env);
                Rebuild();
                StateHasChanged();
            });
        }
        catch (ObjectDisposedException)    { }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException)    { }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "DebouncedRebuildAsync failed for env {Env}", Env);
        }
    }

    private void TogglePaused()
    {
        _paused = !_paused;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── grouping / chart type ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void SetGroupBy(GroupBy g)
    {
        _groupBy = g;
        Rebuild();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnLegendItemClick(LegendItem item, MouseEventArgs e, int index)
    {
        if (e.CtrlKey)
        {
            item.Visible = !item.Visible;
            _lastClickedIndex = index;
        }
        else if (e.ShiftKey && _lastClickedIndex >= 0)
        {
            // Range-select operates on the currently filtered/visible list — indices are
            // positions within it, not the unfiltered _legendItems.
            var visible = FilteredLegendItems;
            int lo = Math.Min(index, _lastClickedIndex);
            int hi = Math.Max(index, _lastClickedIndex);
            bool target = !item.Visible;
            for (int i = lo; i <= hi && i < visible.Count; i++)
                visible[i].Visible = target;
            _lastClickedIndex = index;
        }
        else
        {
            bool soloAlready = _legendItems.Count(i => i.Visible) == 1 && item.Visible;
            foreach (var i in _legendItems)
                i.Visible = soloAlready || ReferenceEquals(i, item);
            _lastClickedIndex = index;
        }

        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── data building ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void Rebuild()
    {
        _lastUpdated = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var services = _services;

        // Build legend items keyed by group
        var groups = GroupServices(services);
        var prevVisibility = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Visible);

        _legendItems = groups.Select((kv, idx) =>
        {
            var color = Palette[idx % Palette.Length];
            var count = kv.Value.Count;
            var mb    = kv.Value.Sum(s => GetCurrentMb(s));
            return new LegendItem
            {
                Key           = kv.Key,
                Name          = FormatLegendName(kv.Key),
                Color         = color,
                CurrentMb     = mb,
                AverageMb     = count > 0 ? mb / count : 0,
                InstanceCount = count,
                Visible       = prevVisibility.TryGetValue(kv.Key, out var v) ? v : true
            };
        }).OrderBy(i => i.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();

        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> GroupServices(IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> services)
    {
        var result = new Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        foreach (var svc in services)
        {
            var key = _groupBy switch
            {
                GroupBy.Host    => svc.HostName,
                GroupBy.Service => svc.ServiceName,
                // None = individual process. PIDs are only unique per host, so two
                // different hosts can report the same service name + PID — host must
                // be part of the key or their memory samples get silently merged.
                _               => svc.HostName + "|" + svc.ServiceName + "|" + svc.ProcessId
            };
            if (!result.TryGetValue(key, out var list))
                result[key] = list = [];
            list.Add(svc);
        }
        return result;
    }

    private void BuildChartData()
    {
        var services  = _services;
        var groups    = GroupServices(services);
        var colorMap  = _legendItems.ToDictionary(i => i.Key, i => i.Color);
        var visible   = _legendItems.Where(i => i.Visible).Select(i => i.Key).ToHashSet(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Line chart: build one series per visible group, aligned on a shared time axis
        BuildLineData(groups, colorMap, visible);
    }

    private void BuildLineData(
        Dictionary<string, List<ServiceStatus>> groups,
        Dictionary<string, string> colorMap,
        HashSet<string> visible)
    {
        _lineSeries = [];
        foreach (var (key, svcs) in groups)
        {
            if (!visible.Contains(key)) continue;

            var color = colorMap.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c : "#888";

            // Merge and sort all samples for this group, dedup by timestamp.
            var samples = svcs
                .SelectMany(svc => MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, svc))
                .GroupBy(s => s.Timestamp)
                .Select(g => (
                    Timestamp: g.Key,
                    Main:  g.Sum(s => s.CurrentUsageBytes),
                    Child: g.Sum(s => s.ChildUsageBytes)))
                .OrderBy(s => s.Timestamp)
                .ToList();

            if (samples.Count == 0) continue;

            var timestamps = samples.Select(s => new DateTimeOffset(s.Timestamp, TimeSpan.Zero).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds()).ToArray();

            var totalValues = samples.Select(s => (s.Main + s.Child) / 1e6).ToArray();
            _lineSeries.Add(new LineSeriesDto(key, color, timestamps, totalValues));

            if (_splitView)
            {
                var childValues = samples.Select(s => s.Child / 1e6).ToArray();
                if (childValues.Any(v => v > 0))
                    _lineSeries.Add(new LineSeriesDto(key + "\tchild", color, timestamps, childValues, IsFaded: true, Label: key + " (children)"));
            }
        }
    }

    private void SetWindow(double? hours)
    {
        _windowHours = hours;
        _chartDirty  = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void SetSplitView(bool split)
    {
        _splitView  = split;
        BuildChartData();
        _chartDirty = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── chart renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RenderLineAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memoryLineChart.render", _chartRef, _brushRef, _lineSeries, _windowHours); }
        catch (Exception) { }
    }

    // ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string FormatLegendName(string key)
    {
        if (_groupBy != GroupBy.None) return key;
        var parts = key.Split('|', 3); // Host|ServiceName|ProcessId
        return parts.Length == 3 ? $"{parts[1]} ({parts[2]}) · {parts[0]}" : key;
    }

    private string LegendTitle => _groupBy switch
    {
        GroupBy.Host    => "Hosts",
        GroupBy.Service => "Services",
        _               => "Processes"
    };

    private double GetCurrentMb(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var s = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, svc);
        return s is not null ? s.TotalCurrentBytes / 1e6 : (svc.RamMb ?? 0);
    }

    private static string FormatMb(double mb)
        => mb >= 1000 ? $"{mb / 1024.0:F1} GB" : $"{mb:F0} MB";

    // ── disposal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        // Event unsubscribe + subscription release are synchronous and must happen
        // immediately — leaving them out would leak a delegate/poll subscription for
        // the life of the process, unlike the JS cleanup below.
        lock (_renderGate) { _disposed = true; }
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        _subscription?.Dispose();

        // Fire-and-forget: this only tears down client-side D3/RAF state for a chart
        // container Blazor is about to remove from the DOM anyway as part of this same
        // tab-close. Awaiting a JS interop round trip here just makes the tab visually
        // linger until the SignalR round trip completes, for no benefit.
        _ = SafeDestroyChartAsync();
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }

    private async Task SafeDestroyChartAsync()
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("memoryLineChart.destroy", _chartRef); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        catch (Exception) { /* best-effort cleanup only */ }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MongoCollectionInfoDialog.razor
LENGTH 4128
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@inject IMongoReader MongoSvc

<MudDialog Style="min-width:560px;">
    <TitleContent>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Info" Size="Size.Small" />
            <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">@Collection.Name</MudText>
        </div>
    </TitleContent>
    <DialogContent>
        @if (_loading)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" />
        }
        else if (_details is not null)
        {
            <!-- Stats grid -->
            <div class="bm-info-stats">
                <div class="bm-info-stat">
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-label">Documents</span>
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-val">@_details.Summary.DocumentCount.ToString("N0")</span>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-info-stat">
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-label">Storage</span>
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-val">@FormatBytes(_details.Summary.StorageSizeBytes)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-info-stat">
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-label">Avg Document</span>
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-val">@FormatBytes(_details.Summary.AvgDocSizeBytes)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-info-stat">
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-label">Indexes</span>
                    <span class="bm-info-stat-val">@_details.Indexes.Count</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <MudDivider Class="my-3" />

            <!-- Indexes table -->
            <MudText Typo="Typo.subtitle2" Class="mb-2">Indexes</MudText>

        }
    </DialogContent>
    <DialogActions>
        <MudButton OnClick="@(() => MudDialogInstance.Close())" Variant="Variant.Text">Close</MudButton>
    </DialogActions>
</MudDialog>

@code {
    [CascadingParameter] IMudDialogInstance MudDialogInstance { get; set; } = null!;

    [Parameter] public MongoCollectionSummary Collection  { get; set; } = new();
    [Parameter] public string                 Database    { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string                 Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private MongoCollectionDetails? _details;
    private bool                    _loading = true;

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _details = await MongoSvc.GetCollectionDetailsAsync(Environment, Database, Collection.Name);
        _loading = false;
    }

}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/MongoCollectionInfoDialog.razor.cs

namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages;

public partial class MongoCollectionInfoDialog
{
    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024                => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024         => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                     => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };
}

LENGTH 16626

@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@inject IMongoReader MongoSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ILogger<MongoCollectionInspector> Logger
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-inspector">

    <!-- Toolbar -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <span class="bm-inspector-topic">
            <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableChart" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-inspector-topic-icon" />
            @_database.<span style="opacity:.5;">@_collection</span>
        </span>

        <FilterBox Value="@_search"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnSearchChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Search documents…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_fieldHints" />

        <ToolbarRefresh Loading="@_loading"
                        OnRefresh="LoadAsync" />
    </div>

    <!-- Table + detail side by side -->
    <div class="bm-inspector-body">
        <div class="bm-table-wrap">

                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    @{ var dbl = EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, () => SaveDocumentAsync(context)); }

                        <span class="bm-kafka-mono bm-mongo-id">@context.Id</span>

                        <MudTooltip Text="Expand all">

                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SetJsonCollapsedAsync(false))" />
                        </MudTooltip>

                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SetJsonCollapsedAsync(true))" />

                                           Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="@(() => SaveDocumentAsync(_selected))" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Close"
                                       Size="Size.Small"
                                       OnClick="@(() => _selected = null)" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-inspector-detail-body">
                    <div @ref="_jsonRef"></div>
                </div>

                <!-- JSONPath query bar — evaluated against this document's JSON,
                     result rendered into the same tree view above via bmJsonViewer. -->
                <div class="bm-jsonpath-bar">
                    <MudTextField T="string" @bind-Value="_jsonPathQuery" Immediate="true"
                                  Placeholder="JSONPath — e.g. $.items[?(&#64;.price &gt; 10)]"
                                  Variant="Variant.Outlined" Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                  Adornment="Adornment.Start" AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ManageSearch"
                                  @onkeydown="OnJsonPathKeyDown"
                                  Class="bm-jsonpath-input" />
                    <MudTooltip Text="Run query">
                        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.PlayArrow" Size="Size.Small"
                                       OnClick="RunJsonPathQueryAsync" />
                    </MudTooltip>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_jsonPathQuery))
                    {
                        <MudTooltip Text="Clear — show full document again">
                            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Clear" Size="Size.Small"
                                           OnClick="ClearJsonPathQueryAsync" />
                        </MudTooltip>
                    }
                </div>
                @if (_jsonPathError is not null)
                {
                    <div class="bm-jsonpath-error">@_jsonPathError</div>
                }
                else if (_jsonPathMatchCount is not null)

                    <div class="bm-jsonpath-count bm-muted">@_jsonPathMatchCount match@(_jsonPathMatchCount == 1 ? "" : "es")</div>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="bm-batch-footer">
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted bm-footer-count">
            @_totalCount.ToString("N0") doc@(_totalCount == 1 ? "" : "s")
        </MudText>
        <BmPagination Count="_totalPages"

@code {
    [Parameter] public string EntityId    { get; set; } = string.Empty;  // "database/collection"
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private string _database   = string.Empty;
    private string _collection = string.Empty;
    private string _loadedEntityId = string.Empty;

    private List<MongoDocument> _docs       = new();
    private MongoDocument?      _selected   = null;
    private ElementReference    _jsonRef;
    private ElementReference    _detailRef;
    private DotNetObjectReference<MongoCollectionInspector>? _selfRef;
    private double              _detailWidth = 380;
    private bool                _jsonDirty;
    private string              _search     = string.Empty;
    private string?             _filterParseError = null;
    private bool                _loading    = true;
    private long                _totalCount = 0;
    private int                 _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private string?             _sortField  = null;
    private bool                _sortDesc   = false;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("plain text",  "searches _id"),
        ("field:value", "regex on any field"),
        ("field:>100",  "numeric / date comparison"),
        ("{ … }",       "raw MongoDB query"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        // Guard against redundant reloads: Blazor calls OnParametersSetAsync on
        // every re-render that passes parameters down to this component (e.g.
        // MainLayout.StateHasChanged() from a tab-loading spinner notification),
        // not just when EntityId actually changes. Without this check, LoadAsync
        // -> TabService.NotifyChanged() -> ancestor re-render -> OnParametersSetAsync
        // -> LoadAsync becomes an infinite loop.
        if (EntityId == _loadedEntityId) return;
        _loadedEntityId = EntityId;

        var parts   = EntityId.Split('/', 2);
        _database   = parts.Length > 0 ? parts[0] : string.Empty;
        _collection = parts.Length > 1 ? parts[1] : string.Empty;
        _page       = 1;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var ct = _cts.Token;

        _loading = true;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var skip = (_page - 1) * _pageSize;
            var (docs, total) = await MongoSvc.GetDocumentsAsync(
                Environment, _database, _collection,
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_search) ? null : _search,
                skip, _pageSize, _sortField, _sortDesc, ct, DtSvc.UseUtc);
            _docs       = docs.ToList();
            _totalCount = total;
            _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(total / (double)_pageSize));
            _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to query {Db}/{Col} in env {Env}", _database, _collection, Environment);
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load documents: {ex.Message}", ex, "Mongo Collection Inspector");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
        }

        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnSearchChanged(string s)
    {
        _search = s;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _page = 1;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private void SetSort(string field)
    {
        if (_sortField == field) _sortDesc = !_sortDesc;
        else { _sortField = field; _sortDesc = false; }
        _page = 1;
        _ = LoadAsync();
    }

    private string SortIcon(string field) =>
        _sortField != field ? "" : _sortDesc ? " ▼" : " ▲";

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; _ = LoadAsync(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; _ = LoadAsync(); }

    private void OnRowClick(TableRowClickEventArgs<MongoDocument> args)
    {
        _selected  = ReferenceEquals(_selected, args.Item) ? null : args.Item;
        _jsonDirty = _selected is not null;
        // A stale query result from a previously selected document shouldn't linger
        // once the selection changes — reset the bar, OnAfterRenderAsync re-renders
        // the newly selected document's full JSON via _jsonDirty above.
        _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
    }

    private void OnRowSelected(MongoDocument? doc) { } // handled by OnRowClick

    // ── JSONPath query bar ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string  _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
    private string? _jsonPathError;
    private int?    _jsonPathMatchCount;

    private async Task OnJsonPathKeyDown(KeyboardEventArgs e)
    {
        if (e.Key == "Enter") await RunJsonPathQueryAsync();
        else if (e.Key == "Escape") await ClearJsonPathQueryAsync();
    }

    private async Task RunJsonPathQueryAsync()
    {
        if (_selected is null) return;

        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_jsonPathQuery))
        {
            await ClearJsonPathQueryAsync();
            return;
        }

        var result = JsonPathQueryService.Evaluate(_selected.Json, _jsonPathQuery);
        if (!result.Success)
        {
            _jsonPathError      = result.Error;
            _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }

        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = result.MatchCount;
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, result.ResultJson); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task ClearJsonPathQueryAsync()
    {
        _jsonPathQuery      = string.Empty;
        _jsonPathError      = null;
        _jsonPathMatchCount = null;
        if (_selected is not null)
        {
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, _selected.Json); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task OnResizerMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmInspectorResizer.start", e.ClientX, _selfRef, _detailRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void SetDetailWidth(double w) => _detailWidth = Math.Clamp(w, 250, 900);

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_jsonDirty && _selected is not null)
        {
            _jsonDirty = false;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.render", _jsonRef, _selected.Json); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogWarning(ex, "JSON viewer render failed for {Collection}", _collection);
                Notifications.Report("Failed to render the document preview.", ex, "Mongo Collection Inspector");
            }
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveDocumentAsync(MongoDocument? doc)
    {
        if (doc is null) return;
        _selected = doc;
        var pretty   = FormatJson(doc.Json);
        var filename = string.Concat($"{doc.Id}.json"
            .Select(c => Path.GetInvalidFileNameChars().Contains(c) ? '_' : c));
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmSaveFile", filename, pretty, "application/json");
    }

    private async Task SetJsonCollapsedAsync(bool collapsed)
    {
        try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmJsonViewer.setAllCollapsed", _jsonRef, collapsed); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }

    private static string TruncateJson(string json)
        => json.Length > 140 ? json[..140] + "…" : json;

    private static string FormatJson(string raw)
    {
        try
        {
            var doc = System.Text.Json.JsonDocument.Parse(raw);
            return System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Serialize(
                doc.RootElement,
                new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = true });
        }
        catch { return raw; }
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private List<string>                 _databaseNames = new();
    private List<MongoCollectionSummary> _paged         = new();
    private string  _selectedDb       = string.Empty;
    private string  _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private bool    _loading          = false;
    private long    _totalCount       = 0;
    private int     _page = 1, _pageSize = 25, _totalPages = 1;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("name / collection", "filter by collection name (e.g. batch*)"),
    ];

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        // Load database names only — fast even with 100+ databases (no dbStats).
        _databaseNames = (await MongoSvc.GetDatabaseNamesAsync(Environment, _cts.Token)).ToList();
        if (_databaseNames.Count > 0)
        {
            // Prefer the environment's actually-configured database (Mongo:DatabaseName)
            // over whichever one happens to sort first alphabetically.
            var defaultDb = MongoSvc.GetDefaultDatabaseName(Environment);
            _selectedDb = defaultDb is not null && _databaseNames.Contains(defaultDb)
                ? defaultDb
                : _databaseNames[0];
            await LoadCollectionsAsync();
        }
    }

    private async Task OnDbChanged(string db)
    {
        _selectedDb = db;
        _filterText = string.Empty;
        _page       = 1;
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadCollectionsAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var ct = _cts.Token;

        _loading = true;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var skip = (_page - 1) * _pageSize;
            var (collections, total) = await MongoSvc.GetCollectionPageAsync(
                Environment, _selectedDb,
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText) ? null : _filterText,
                skip, _pageSize, ct);

            _paged      = collections.ToList();
            _totalCount = total;
            _totalPages = Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling(total / (double)_pageSize));
            _page       = Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load collections: {ex.Message}", ex, "Mongo Dashboard");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
        }
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText       = text;
        _filterParseError = null;
        _page             = 1;
        _ = LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    private void OnPageChanged(int p) { _page = p; _ = LoadCollectionsAsync(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; _ = LoadCollectionsAsync(); }

    private void OpenInspector(string collection)
        => TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateMongoCollectionInspector(_selectedDb, collection, Environment));

    private async Task OpenPurgeCollectionsDialogAsync()
    {
        // Loaded fresh (not from _paged, which is server-paginated/possibly filtered) so
        // the purge dialog's filter always has the full collection list for this DB to
        // search over, regardless of the page's own current filter/page.
        var db = _selectedDb;
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<BulkActionDialog>
        {
            { x => x.ActionVerb,        "Purge" },
            { x => x.ButtonColor,       Color.Error },
            { x => x.ItemLabel,         "Mongo collection" },
            { x => x.LoadItemsAsync,    async () => (await MongoSvc.GetCollectionNamesAsync(Environment, db)).ToList() },
            { x => x.Endpoint,          "api/mongo/purge" },
            { x => x.BuildRequestBody,  (List<string> items) => new { Env = Environment, Database = db, Items = items } },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<BulkActionDialog>("Purge Mongo collections", parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private async Task ShowInfoAsync(MongoCollectionSummary col)
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Collection,  col          },
            { x => x.Database,    _selectedDb  },
            { x => x.Environment, Environment  },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<MongoCollectionInfoDialog>(col.Name, parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Medium, FullWidth = false });
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmAsync(string message, string confirmText = "Delete")
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Confirm", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message     },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, confirmText },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task DeleteCollectionAsync(string collection)
    {
        if (!await ConfirmAsync($"Drop \"{collection}\" from {_selectedDb}? This cannot be undone.")) return;
        await MongoSvc.DropCollectionAsync(Environment, _selectedDb, collection, _cts.Token);
        Snackbar.Add($"Collection \"{collection}\" dropped.", Severity.Success);
        await LoadCollectionsAsync();
    }

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}

namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages;

public partial class MongoDashboard
{
    private static string FormatBytes(long b) => b switch
    {
        < 1024                => $"{b} B",
        < 1024 * 1024         => $"{b / 1024} KB",
        < 1024L * 1024 * 1024 => $"{b / (1024 * 1024)} MB",
        _                     => $"{b / (1024L * 1024 * 1024)} GB",
    };
}
